footer.text: Designed & developed by Koladé Moussè Aboudou · Cotonou, Benin

hero.desc: Full Stack developer specializing in TypeScript — scalable APIs with NestJS, modern interfaces with Next.js and Nuxt 3. Based in Cotonou, available worldwide remote.

about.label: About
about.title: Who am I?
about.p1: Passionate full stack developer with 3+ years of experience, comfortable on both back-end (NestJS, Laravel) and front-end (Next.js TSX, Nuxt 3 TS). TypeScript has become my daily language.
about.p2: Currently completing a Master's in Information Systems Management (2025–2026), I'm looking to join international teams in full remote to tackle ambitious technical challenges. Code quality, clean architecture and user experience are my priorities.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm passionate about mangas, animes, music and exploring new technologies to stay current in a fast-moving ecosystem.

items.date: December 19, 2025 – Present · Cotonou, Benin (remote from Vipp offices)
items.desc: Development of modern interfaces with Next.js and TypeScript (TSX). Integration of reusable components, performance optimization and collaboration with product teams.

items.date: December 19, 2025 – Present · Cotonou, Benin (remote from Vipp offices)
items.desc: Design and development of conversion-focused landing pages with Next.js and TypeScript (TSX). UX optimization to maximize customer acquisition and sales.

items.date: December 3, 2024 – December 15, 2025 · Cotonou, Benin (remote from Vipp offices)
items.desc: Development of web interfaces with React.js and TypeScript (TSX). UI component design, state management and REST API integration.
Intensive web development training (6-month bootcamp + 16 months paid internship). Stack: Laravel, Vue.js, Inertia.js, Node.js and Nuxt.js.
Discovery and contribution to large-scale institutional information systems.

items.role: Master's in Information Systems Management at ENEAM — in progress
items.date: + Bachelor's in Computer Systems and Software · LES COURS SONOU (2022)

projects.title: What I've built
projects.sub: Real app clones — open source code on GitHub

twitter-clone.description: Real-time feed, tweets, likes, retweets, user profiles and notifications. Complete JWT authentication with refresh tokens.

airbnb-clone.description: Accommodation search with advanced filters, interactive Mapbox map, booking system and simulated payments.

shopify-clone.description: Product catalog, persistent cart, orders, complete admin dashboard and Stripe integration for payments.

perso.description: Personal project in active development. It will be a digital platform dedicated to the valorization of African literature and stories inspired by the realities of the continent.
